pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh (USE sakila;), and verifier.py logic.
Task description and verifier.py checks for "v_july_2005_utilization".
Task description specifies this path, and setup_task.sh explicitly removes it during initialization.
Task description specifies "July 2005", and setup_task.sh injects data for "2005-07-10" and "2005-07-20".
Task description requests "top 30 films", and verifier.py explicitly checks top_n = 30.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic Sakila database. The target database is "sakila", and the goal is to create a view named "v_july_2005_utilization" analyzing data for July 2005 ("2005-07"). The final output must be exported to "/home/ga/Documents/exports/high_utilization_films.csv" containing the top 30 (top_n = 30) films. Setup scripts inject specific anomalies (negative duration and NULL return dates) into the rental table for July 2005 to test data cleaning logic.
